editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: Draft weekend aftermath leads — post-draft analysis and fallout stories

candidates_considered.story: Diego Pavia Goes Undrafted, Ravens Minicamp
candidates_considered.hook: Heisman finalist goes undrafted, first since 2014

candidates_considered.story: LeBron Worst Playoff Game Ever at Age 41
candidates_considered.hook: 8 turnovers, worst numbers in playoff history
Stafford replacement while he's still MVP

candidates_considered.story: Uar Bernard Nigeria Drafted Over Pavia
candidates_considered.hook: Never played football vs Heisman finalist

stories.headline: Diego Pavia Goes Undrafted Then Gets Ravens Minicamp Invite
stories.editorial_direction: This is the draft's biggest shocker. Heisman finalist undrafted for first time since 2014. Hit the polarizing reputation, height issues, controversial moments, then pivot to Ravens opportunity. Compare to Jordan Lynch 2014.

tweets.text: Vanderbilt undrafted free agent QB Diego Pavia accepted an invitation to next weekend's minicamp with the Baltimore Ravens, per source.
Uar Bernard out of Nigeria was drafted having never played football while Heisman finalist Diego Pavia went undrafted 😭

key_stats: First Heisman finalist undrafted since Jordan Lynch 2014
Led Vanderbilt to first 10-win season in program history
Measured 5'9 7/8" at combine — shortest by 2+ inches
research_notes.historical_context: Jordan Lynch (Northern Illinois 2014) was last Heisman finalist undrafted. Collin Klein (Kansas State 2013) also undrafted year prior. Both were run-first QBs who couldn't transition
controversy_background: Posted 'F all the voters' after losing Heisman to Mendoza
Sued NCAA for extra eligibility year and won
Trespassed and urinated on rival New Mexico's practice field at NMSU
Brothers repeatedly drew law enforcement attention at Vanderbilt games
why_undrafted: Arm strength questions for NFL level
11 other undrafted QBs signed before him
research_notes.ravens_connection: Ravens HC Jesse Minter worked with Vanderbilt HC Clark Lea in 2021. Only 2 QBs on roster (Lamar Jackson, Tyler Huntley) so opportunity exists
vanderbilt_transformation: Pavia led to 7 wins in 2024, 10 wins in 2025
First SEC Offensive Player of the Year in school history
Beat Tennessee at Neyland Stadium for first time since 1982
research_notes.draft_context: Mendoza (#1 overall) and Jeremiyah Love (#3 overall) were top 2 Heisman finalists. Pavia finished runner-up but went completely undrafted
research_notes.meme_angle: Uar Bernard from Nigeria drafted by Eagles having never played organized football — while Heisman finalist sits home
research_notes.where_it_goes: Minicamp tryout May 1-3. Must earn roster spot with no guarantees. Likely headed for UFL/CFL if NFL doesn't work

stories.headline: 41-Year-Old LeBron Has Worst Playoff Game of His Career
stories.editorial_direction: Father Time finally won a battle. Historic bad numbers, back-to-back 8 turnover games. But Lakers still up 3-1. The duality of aging greatness.

tweets.text:
I can't believe LeBron James is doing this at 41 years old!! 

10 Points
2-9 FG
0-3 3P
8 Turnovers 

Bron just had the WORST playoff game of his career. Father Time won tonight.

LeBron in Game 4 vs Houston:

10 PTS
9 AST (8 TOV)
2-9 FG
0-3 3P

Back-to-back playoff games with 8 TOV for the first time in his career.

Defense on                              Defense on 
LeBron in 2018                       LeBron in 2026

historic_bad_numbers: 10 points on 2-9 shooting — lowest playoff output since 2007
Back-to-back 8-turnover playoff games for first time ever
Played 45+ minutes in Game 3, then benched final 7:25 of Game 4
research_notes.age_context: At 41 years old, showing rare signs of decline. Still averaging 25+ PPG in series but Game 4 was different
research_notes.series_context: Lakers still up 3-1 despite LeBron's worst game. No team has ever blown 3-0 playoff lead in NBA history
research_notes.supporting_cast: Without Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, more pressure on LeBron. Marcus Smart and Luke Kennard also struggled in Game 4
research_notes.where_it_goes: Game 5 Wednesday in LA. Can close out series at home. Question is whether Game 4 was aberration or sign of things to come

stories.headline: Rams Draft Stafford's Replacement While He's Still the Reigning MVP
stories.editorial_direction: Ty Simpson at #13 was the draft's biggest shocker. Sean McVay won't say what he told 38-year-old Stafford. Awkward timing.

tweets.text:
Wake up, @MelKiperESPN's final draft grades are here‼️

All the winners, losers and steals of the 2026 NFL draft ⬇️

research_notes.shock_factor: Alabama QB Ty Simpson taken #13 by Rams — only 2nd QB taken in Round 1 after Mendoza #1
research_notes.stafford_context: Matthew Stafford is 38, coming off MVP season. Still has 2 years left on contract
research_notes.mcvay_comments: Admitted he had a conversation with Stafford but 'wouldn't divulge what was said'
research_notes.awkward_timing: Taking your MVP's replacement in Round 1 while he's still at his peak is rare NFL move

stories.headline: Nigeria's Uar Bernard Gets Drafted Having Never Played Football
stories.editorial_direction: The Pavia contrast writes itself. Eagles draft a guy from Nigeria who's never played organized football while Heisman finalist sits home.

tweets.text: Uar Bernard out of Nigeria was drafted having never played football while Heisman finalist Diego Pavia went undrafted 😭

research_notes.basic_facts: Eagles drafted Uar Bernard in 7th round. From Nigeria, never played organized football
research_notes.pavia_contrast: Meanwhile, Heisman Trophy finalist and SEC Offensive Player of the Year goes completely undrafted
research_notes.draft_logic: NFL values measurables and potential over college production in late rounds

stories.headline: Mike Tomlin: Recent Playoff Failures Drove My Decision to Step Away
stories.editorial_direction: Rare admission from a coach. Said veterans deserved 'excitement and optimism of new leadership.' Translation: I wasn't getting it done.

research_notes.tomlin_quote: Walked away 'in part, because of the recent lack of playoff success' and belief veterans were 'worthy of the excitement and the optimism associated with new leadership'
research_notes.steelers_context: Pittsburgh had struggled in recent playoff runs. Tomlin stepping aside rather than being fired
research_notes.rare_admission: Unusual for coach to directly cite playoff failures as reason for departure
